spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (window.) with runtime script (~2254 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 5 buttons, 1 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (automatically, blur, chip, chips, chrome, click, each, editing, ellipsis, focus, full, label, overflow, restore, reveal,).

edge_cases.rationale: No visible edge case / fallback / error handling — only the happy path.

references.rationale: Page does not include the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link — violates the rule #3 self-heal invariant.

design_system.rationale: All colours come via 50 CSS-variable references, no raw hex, no button background override without a colour override, and not a static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Add explicit edge case coverage
openQuestions.detail: Pick one failure mode the spec or chromestatus motivation calls out (unsupported browser, denied permission, empty input, etc.) and surface it as a distinct demo state alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link
openQuestions.detail: Page is missing the chromestatus.com/feature/5146265241387008 link inside a `references` section. CLAUDE.md rule #3 requires this on every concept so the slug-recovery script can re-derive the canonical name.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("When a user interacts (editing or caret navigation) with text which has ‘text-overflow: ellipsis’ set, the text switches temporarily from ellipsis to clip allowing the user to see and interact with the hidden overflow content. This feature ") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://www.w3.org/TR/css-overflow-3/#ellipsis-interaction to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~2254 chars of script across 5 button(s) and 1 other control(s). hits 4 pass / 0 partial / 2 fail across the six rubric criteria.
